# Team News: Egypt vs Iran injury, suspension list, predicted XIs before World Cup clash

By Saikat Mandal| 26 Jun 2026 04:00, Last updated: 26 Jun 2026 04:00

© Imago / IMAGO / ZUMA Press Wire

Egypt have a golden opportunity to progress through to the 2026 World Cup knockout rounds if they win or draw against Iran in the final match in Seattle.

Egypt are top of Group G with four points after winning 3-1 against New Zealand in matchday two, where Iran are undefeated with two points, and here Sports Mole rounds up the team news for both sides.

---

## EGYPT vs. IRAN

https://www.sportsmole.co.uk/football/world-cup/egypt-vs-iran_game_248967.html

## EGYPT

Out: Hossam Abdelmaguid(head)

Doubtful: Hamdy Fathy (hamstring)

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Shobeir; Hany, Ibrahim, Rabia, Fatouh; Attia, Lasheen; Salah, Ashour, Ziko; Marmoush

## IRAN

Out: None

Doubtful: Roozbeh Cheshmi(hamstring)

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Beiranvand; Rezaeian, Khalilzadeh, Nemati, Hajsafi, Kanaani; Mohebi, Ezatolahi, Ghoddos, Jahanbakhsh; Taremi

news_items.title: Egyptian National Team Continues Preparations to Face…| YSscores
news_items.text:
Egyptian National Team Continues Preparations to Face…| YSscores

FIFA · 2026 World Cup 🇺🇸 🇨🇦 🇲🇽 USA · Canada · Mexico Kickoff in 00 Days : 00 Hours : 00 Mins : 00 Secs The tournament is live! Follow Tournament

# Egyptian National Team Continues Preparations to Face Iran

Wednesday 24-06-2026

The Egyptian national team has entered the final stage of its preparations to face Iran in the upcoming third and final round of the group stage of the 2026 World Cup. The "Pharaohs" conducted a new training session in Spokane, USA, under the leadership of the coaching staff led by the twins Hossam and Ibrahim Hassan.The training session, which included 24 players, was held at Gonzaga University's fields as part of the preparations for the decisive match that could determine the fate of the Egyptian national team in the race to qualify for the next round.On the medical front, midfielder Hamdi Fathi underwent a special rehabilitation program after suffering from pain in his hamstring, while defender Hossam Abdel-Meguid continued his treatment program. He also underwent medical examinations under the supervision of Dr. Mohamed Abou El-Ela, the national team's doctor, to ensure his physic

# Team News: Egypt vs Iran injury, suspension list, predicted XIs before World Cup clash

By Saikat Mandal| 26 Jun 2026 04:00, Last updated: 26 Jun 2026 04:00

© Imago / IMAGO / ZUMA Press Wire

Egypt have a golden opportunity to progress through to the 2026 World Cup knockout rounds if they win or draw against Iran in the final match in Seattle.

Egypt are top of Group G with four points after winning 3-1 against New Zealand in matchday two, where Iran are undefeated with two points, and here Sports Mole rounds up the team news for both sides.

---

## EGYPT vs. IRAN

https://www.sportsmole.co.uk/football/world-cup/egypt-vs-iran_game_248967.html

## EGYPT

Out: Hossam Abdelmaguid(head)

Doubtful: Hamdy Fathy (hamstring)

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Shobeir; Hany, Ibrahim, Rabia, Fatouh; Attia, Lasheen; Salah, Ashour, Ziko; Marmoush

## IRAN

Out: None

Doubtful: Roozbeh Cheshmi(hamstring)

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Beiranvand; Rezaeian, Khalilzadeh, Nemati, Hajsafi, Kanaani; Mohebi, Ezatolahi, Ghoddos, Jahanbakhsh; Taremi"}

FIFA · 2026 World Cup 🇺🇸 🇨🇦 🇲🇽 USA · Canada · Mexico Kickoff in 00 Days : 00 Hours : 00 Mins : 00 Secs The tournament is live! Follow Tournament

# Egyptian National Team Continues Preparations to Face Iran

Wednesday 24-06-2026

The Egyptian national team has entered the final stage of its preparations to face Iran in the upcoming third and final round of the group stage of the 2026 World Cup. The "Pharaohs" conducted a new training session in Spokane, USA, under the leadership of the coaching staff led by the twins Hossam and Ibrahim Hassan.The training session, which included 24 players, was held at Gonzaga University's fields as part of the preparations for the decisive match that could determine the fate of the Egyptian national team in the race to qualify for the next round.On the medical front, midfielder Hamdi Fathi underwent a special rehabilitation program after suffering from pain in his hamstring, while defender Hossam Abdel-Meguid continued his treatment program. He also underwent medical examinations under the supervision of Dr. Mohamed Abou El-Ela, the national team's doctor, to ensure his physic"}
